best_bet.reason: Horry County has slightly bigger waves at 1 to 3 feet compared to Georgetown's 1-footer, giving you more action if you're into body surfing or want better definition in the water.

counties.name: Horry County
counties.beaches: Myrtle Beach · North Myrtle Beach · Surfside Beach · Garden City

counties.name: Georgetown County
counties.beaches: Pawleys Island · Litchfield Beach · Huntington Beach State Park
